recommended_fertilizer: 40-60 kg N, 40 kg P2O5, 20 kg K2O per acre (adjust by soil test)
dosage: Apply full P and K and 1/2 N at sowing.
alternative_organic_option: Use 2-3 tons FYM/acre + vermicompost based on soil test.

recommended_fertilizer: Remaining 1/2 N as urea at first irrigation.
dosage: Apply along rows at first irrigation.
alternative_organic_option: Use liquid manure like jeevamrut and compost tea.

recommended_fertilizer: 40-50 kg N, 30 kg P2O5, 20 kg K2O per acre.
dosage: Full P & K and 1/3 N at puddling.
alternative_organic_option: Green manuring with dhaincha before transplanting.

recommended_fertilizer: 1/3 N as top dressing at active tillering.
dosage: Apply on moist soil and maintain 2-3 cm water.

recommended_fertilizer: 40 kg N, 25 kg P2O5, 20 kg K2O per acre.
alternative_organic_option: Use FYM + rock phosphate + potash rich ash.

dosage: Side-dress between rows at knee-high stage.
alternative_organic_option: Use liquid organic manures and mulching.

recommended_fertilizer: 40 kg N, 40 kg P2O5, 40 kg K2O per acre.
dosage: Apply at planting and mix well in ridges.
alternative_organic_option: Use FYM + wood ash + bone meal as per soil test.

recommended_fertilizer: Use balanced NPK, about 40 kg N, 25 kg P2O5, 25 kg K2O per acre.
dosage: Split N in 3-4 doses during growth.

recommended_fertilizer: Additional N and K as per soil test.
dosage: Top dressing along rows, avoid waterlogging.
alternative_organic_option: Use castor cake and potash rich manures.

recommended_fertilizer: 20 kg N, 40 kg P2O5 per acre (N mainly for starter).
dosage: Apply at sowing and inoculate seed with Rhizobium.
